CREATE TABLE keys (id INT PRIMARY KEY, cert_data VARCHAR(255), key_type VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO keys (id, cert_data, key_type) VALUES (1, file_to_string('keys/mycert.pfx'), 'X.509');
xenc_key_create_cert('myRSA', (SELECT cert_data FROM keys WHERE id = 1), 'X.509', 2, NULL, 'secret');
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, public_key VARCHAR(255));
SELECT user_id, (SELECT public_key FROM users WHERE user_id = 1) AS pub_key FROM users;
xenc_set_primary_key((SELECT public_key FROM users WHERE user_id = 1));
CREATE TABLE certificates (cert_id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_name VARCHAR(50), cert_data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO certificates (cert_id, key_name, cert_data) VALUES (1, 'myRSA', file_to_string('keys/mycert.pfx'));
SELECT key_name FROM certificates WHERE cert_id = 1 AND cert_data IS NOT NULL;
xenc_key_create_cert('myRSA', (SELECT cert_data FROM certificates WHERE cert_id = 1), 'X.509', 2, NULL, 'secret');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certificates WHERE key_name = 'myRSA';
